title: FFBandage
description: Adds a simple healing bandage with configurable settings. A Fyxe's Features mod.
body:
# Bandage
Adds a bandage craftable with 2 paper and 1 stick. The bandage is "consumed" and heals 1 or 2 hearts (configurable).

This was originaly created for my Cooperative+ modpack as a mitigation to early game food deprivation. 

# What is FF?
Fyxe's Features are small mods that are designed to be easily added (or removed) from any modpack. They often revolve around adding a few items or creating compatibility between mods in simple, non-intrusive ways.
